title: Doodled
body: ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EYQooEfT/images/63cf1e1c8d4550d2e8ca5707f5abe02f3ea0835c.png) ## Simple introduction A **resource pack** drawn by hand that makes your game look more **simplistic and cartoonish**. This pack has every single texture done by hand in a **64x64 resulution**, it gives the pack feeling like someone really drew it (which I did). It is filled with squiggly and wiggly lines that try to stay in vanilla boundries. You can use this pack to make your game look cursed or just enjoy not too basic looking blocks, items and entitys. ## How to use When downloaded bootup Minecraft from any version that is comatible with this pack. than from main menu navigate to **"Options"**, **"Resource Packs"** and klick on **"open Pack Folder"** now just drag the resource pack to that folder and you are done. ## NB! Pack may not work correctly in older versions with out modifications to the pack. ## Please do not contact KasaiSora with your issues! KasaiSora is not reponsible for the issues with in the project 🙃 join the discord instead with you issue at ---> https://discord.gg/kasaisora ## Trailer # Support / Credits [](https://membercat.com) This project is part of **Membercat Studios** by **KasaiSora** and has been created by: - **EgertSUS**: Everything To report an issue, receive support, or give your feedback, join our [Discord Server](https://dc.kasai.gg).
